title: Hillary Clinton's fake face
excerpt: What is this i just can't imagine that she just booked in for two balls why did these images even go viral in the first place well i've been kind of obviously paying attention to this space for a while now and i've definitely noticed a trend of picking odd pictures and then makin…

segments.text: what is this i just can't imagine that she just booked in for two balls why did these images even go viral in the first place well i've been kind of obviously paying attention to this space for a while now and i've definitely noticed a trend of picking odd pictures and then making the story that they've had some kind of crazy plastic surgery mishap and then you see them a few months later and they're fine so it sells papers and it pulls people in and i think they're on the lookout for them and anyone who looks odd it's a plastic surgery mishap and i've got some examples which will hopefully show you guys that a lot of it is nothing to do with plastic surgery it's the papers playing us once again one that really made me laugh was hillary clinton obviously this is a while back but i remembered it and because it's such a bizarre picture and you see it and you can't help but pick the newspaper up and figure out what the hell's going on with their face but um and you know they showed a normal picture of her from 2016 and this new updated version and you think god she's really gone too far hillary

what you're right is it cheat you know people are saying his cheek filler and all that stuff and i just thought i don't think there's a cheek filler would quite do that anyway same lady same night different angle different photo and it looks more normal and that's the hillary clinton that we all know it doesn't look it was neither are good pictures of her i'm sure yeah no i mean it was weird because it would firstly what is this i just can't imagine that she just booked in for two balls but being for two balls please such but also it's so weird and when you look closely at the picture it's clearly there's no texture on the skin it's all obliterated and there's some sort of weird photoshopping going on and maybe it was a quiet news day and they thought well let's just make a hillary there's a weird picture of her we'll do it make it look slightly more weird and sell a few thousand extra papers and it's all made up
